products.title: Auto-Reputation Manager
products.tagline: AI Review Reply Manager for Small Businesses
products.description: Small businesses sit on dozens of unanswered Google, Yelp, and Facebook reviews — every silent star drags discovery and trust. Auto-Reputation Manager scans every review surface, AI drafts a professional reply per review, and suggests the right operational fix (refund, apology, promo). Owner picks auto-post or approval flow. ₱500–2,000/mo subscription.
products.subject_line: You have 23 reviews waiting for a reply. Here's the first batch.
wins: Approval flow keeps owner in control
products.why_works: A visible, embarrassing problem with a fast, professional fix. Owners say yes the moment they see the unread queue.

products.title: Auto-Follow-Up
products.description: Most SMBs never follow up — customers who didn't return, bookings that never finished, abandoned carts. Auto-Follow-Up tracks every lapse, then sends 'we miss you' sequences with discount offers via SMS, WhatsApp, and Email. Triggers on inactivity windows, abandoned bookings, or stalled checkouts. Subscription + usage-based pricing.
products.subject_line: Your last visit was 6 months ago. Come back?
before_bullets: No follow-up after a missed visit
Owner has no time for win-backs
Lost revenue invisible to the books
after_bullets: Multi-channel reach via SMS + WhatsApp + Email
products.why_works: Past customers convert 5–10× cheaper than cold ones. Automating the nudge turns a forgotten list into recurring revenue.

products.title: Inventory Restock Predictor
products.tagline: Auto-Inventory Restock Predictor for Small Shops
products.description: Small retail (sari-sari stores, mini marts, cafés, pharmacies) constantly stock out and over-order — owners track inventory in their head or in a notebook. Inventory Restock Predictor connects via POS, a simple daily input app, or receipt photo scanning. AI builds a real-time model of what's selling, predicts when items will run out, suggests what to restock and when, and auto-drafts the supplier order. Monthly subscription per store plus supplier affiliate cuts.
flow: Connect POS / Daily Input / Receipt Photo
products.subject_line: Coke Zero will run out in 3 days — reorder 5 cases.
wins: No POS required — receipt photos work
Stops stockouts and over-ordering at once
before_bullets: Owner tracks stock in their head
products.why_works: Stockouts cost sales the owner never sees. A 3-day-ahead warning plus a one-tap supplier order is undeniable value at SMB price.
